text.title: AI Cost Attribution Schema Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the monthly LLM bill ≥ $1,000 AND are there ≥ 2 attribution dimensions worth slicing (tenants, features)?

branch.question: Does a telemetry pipeline exist that can ingest structured per-call records?

example.trace: $5k/mo bill, 3 features, OTel + ClickHouse already on → run-the-checklist
